description: CompositionGrey round neck t-shirt made of 85% cotton and 15% viscose, has short sleeves with branding appliqué, embroidery and graphic print on the front with stitch linesFitRegularWash careMachine wash inside out with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach or wringTumble dry or flat dry in shadeWarm iron; Do not iron on decorationsWear your brand on your tee and flaunt your attitude with style with this grey t-shirt from wrangler. The short sleeves sit snug on well-toned arms, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day.  Team this with jeans and sports shoes or cotton shorts and leather sandals for unparalleled cool.Model StatisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
